zh.title: Solana/美元技术分析：高位震荡偏强整理
zh.content:
当前价格在72美元上方窄幅震荡，整体维持高位整理结构，多头略占优势但动能仍偏温和，短期趋势偏震荡上行，市场等待突破方向确认，短线留意量能变化

MACD柱值持续为正，显示多头动能仍在延续，价格站稳SMA20上方，短线结构偏强，RSI缺失但动能参考仍向上，延续性待观察

下方支撑关注71.80与SMA20附近71.44区域，若跌破则可能回测71整数关口。上方阻力集中72.30-72.50区间

建议短线关注72.32突破情况，放量上破可顺势跟多目标72.8-73；若受阻回落，可在71.8下方设止损观望，避免追高

en.title: Solana vs US Dollar Technical Analysis
en.content:
SOL/USD is currently consolidating in a tight range around 72.24 after a modest 0.42% daily gain, indicating a short-term equilibrium between buyers and sellers. Price action remains constructive above the SMA(20) at 71.44, suggesting the broader intraday bias is still mildly bullish. The recent high near 72.32 is acting as immediate resistance, while the low at 71.88 defines near-term support.

From a trend perspective, SOL is transitioning from a shallow recovery phase into a potential continuation setup. The ability to hold above the 20-period moving average reflects improving momentum after prior weakness. However, the lack of RSI data limits confirmation of overbought or oversold conditions, making price structure more important. The steady MACD reading of 0.544 suggests bullish momentum persists, though it may be losing acceleration.

Key support is concentrated at 71.88, followed by a stronger demand zone near 71.40–71.20, aligned with the SMA(20). A break below this area would weaken the current structure and open risk toward deeper retracement levels. On the upside, resistance is firmly placed at 72.32, with a clean breakout potentially targeting the 73.00–73.50 region if volume supports continuation.

Trading conditions favor a range-to-breakout strategy. Long positions are more attractive on pullbacks toward 71.40–71.80 with tight risk control below support. Alternatively, a breakout above 72.32 with sustained momentum could justify trend-following entries. Until a decisive break occurs, SOL remains in a low-volatility consolidation phase where disciplined range trading is most effective.
